The consequence, "the alarm must be notified to the user through the user interface", corresponds to the atomic proposition "alarm_notified_user_ui". The temporal relationship "Once X, then Y must be" indicates that if X occurs, Y must eventually occur. This translates to an implication X -> F Y. Finally, "This property holds for every DMi and DMj" means this condition must always be true, requiring the G (globally) operator to wrap the entire formula.
